description: List of numbered/iconographic feature items. Used on package pages (T6) to show what's included in a package — each item has a number (1, 2, 3…) and a label, optionally a longer description.

item.number: string (display value, e.g. '01' or just text)
item.label: string (the feature itself)

items.label: Foto sesija istog ili drugog dana
3 x 100 štampanih fotografija u drvenoj kutiji
Online galerija sa studijski obrađenim fotografijama
